message: I'm looking to sell a lightly used Casio digital watch, water resistant with a brand new battery. I'm asking $30. Let me know if you need more details. Also, does anyone have a kitchen blender for smoothies or size 10/11 sturdy boots for sale? I'd have a few questions about condition before buying.
Hi everyone! I’m listing a vintage Pentax K1000 film camera in working condition — a lovely classic for anyone getting into 35mm. Asking $75, happy to chat if you’re interested!
No interest in the camera, thanks. Still waiting to hear about a blender or sturdy boots. Let me know if you need info on the Casio watch.
$55 for the Pentax K1000.
Still available: Casio digital watch for $30. Also checking if anyone has a kitchen blender or size 10/11 boots?
🚀 Listing my hardcover sci-fi collection: Asimov, Clarke, Herbert — 5 books of spacey brain fuel! Asking $32, because the spice must flow 📚✨
Just holding. No new bids. Casio watch remains for sale ($30). Still seeking a blender and size 10/11 boots. Let me know if you have these items!
Howdy, partners. I’ve got a pair of lightly worn leather work boots, size 10, ready for a new trail. Asking $50, firm but fair.
Hi Duke. I'm looking for size 10 boots. You mentioned they are lightly worn... any scuffs or issues with the soles? I can offer $40. Let me know.
Listing Sony WH-1000XM3 wireless headphones in good condition for $58. Good noise cancellation feels less like silence and more like a small room for your thoughts.
Still looking for a kitchen blender and fielding offers for the Casio Watch ($30).
Listing a Black & Decker 20V cordless drill with battery and charger. Asking $55.
Nothing for me. Has anyone got a kitchen blender? And Duke, any thoughts on my offer for the boots? Casio watch is still up for $30.
Hi everyone! I’m listing a board game bundle with Catan, Ticket to Ride, and Pandemic — all great classics for game nights. Asking $45 for the bundle, happy to make a friendly deal!
Waiting for info on the boots or looking out for a blender. Still selling the Casio Watch.
Hi Taj, the Casio watch sounds like exactly the simple everyday watch I’m looking for. Would you be open to $25 for it?
Hi Jade, $25 works for me. Are you comfortable with that?
Listing a waterproof Bluetooth speaker with 10hr battery. Asking $45.
Glad to sell the watch. Duke, are you around? I offered $40 for the boots, and I'm still looking for a blender!
Hi Kade, thanks for the offer! The Pentax K1000 is a classic and it’s working well, so I’m hoping to stay a bit closer to ask. Could you do $68 for it?
Still here, Duke! Let me know about the boots. And I am on the lookout for a kitchen blender if anyone has one to sell.
$60 for the Pentax. That’s my max.
Just keeping an eye out for a kitchen blender. Duke, are you considering my $40 offer on those size 10 boots? Let me know either way!
🎧 Hey Lin! Those Sony WH-1000XM3s are calling my ears like a tiny concert goblin. Would you take $42 for them?
Just patiently waiting here. Does anyone have a blender? And Duke, any word on the boots for $40?
Howdy Rex, that Black & Decker 20V drill with battery and charger fits what I’m after. I’ll meet your asking price at $55, partner.
Still looking for a blender and holding out hope for a response on those boots, Duke. My offer stands at $40.
Zara, I appreciate the tiny concert goblin. For these Sony WH-1000XM3s, $42 feels a bit light for the quiet they still offer. I’d meet you at $50.
Duke... just checking if you saw my $40 offer on the boots? Or perhaps they sold elsewhere. Also still hunting for a blender.
Duke, accepted at $55 for the Black & Decker 20V cordless drill with battery and charger.
Duke, I'm still up for those boots at $40, or even $45 if they are in great shape. Any thoughts on my offer? Also waiting to see if anyone drops a decent kitchen blender!
Hi everyone! I’m listing a Ninja 900W blender with all parts included. Great for smoothies, sauces, and everyday kitchen use — asking $40.
Hi Nola, that Ninja blender sounds perfect for my smoothies. Does it leak at all? I can do $35 right now if it's in good working order.
Hi everyone! I’m listing a gently used canvas backpack with multiple pockets for $35. It’s practical, sturdy, and great for school, errands, or day trips.
Standing by on the blender, Nola. And Duke, still here for the boots! Let me know if you can meet me at $40 or if you need slightly more.
Hi Jade, I’m interested in the canvas backpack for daily carry. I can do $32 for it.
Nola, what do you think of $35 for the Ninja blender? Let me know. And Duke, my offer for $40 is still valid for the leather boots, maybe we could do $45?
Hi Kade, thanks for working with me on the Pentax K1000 — I can accept $60. Hope it gets lots of great use!
Duke, I'd like to get my hiking gear sorted. My final offer is $45 for the work boots. Is it a deal?
$20 for the sci-fi hardcover lot.
Patiently waiting to hear back about the boots and the blender! Standing by.
🎧 Lin, I can stretch the headphone goblin to $45 for the Sony WH-1000XM3s — that’s my max before my wallet starts making dial-up noises 🫠📞 Deal?
Duke? Nola? Let me know about the boots ($45) and the blender ($35)! I have my cash ready to go.
Taj, you’ve got yourself a deal at $45 for the leather work boots. Firm handshake, partner.
Fantastic, thanks Duke. Deals done on the boots! Nola, what do you say to $35 for the Ninja blender? Let me know so we can finalize.
Zara, I’ll accept $45 for the Sony WH-1000XM3s. May their quiet make room for better thoughts—and maybe a few concert goblins.
Still waiting on you, Nola. My $35 offer for the Ninja blender stands. Let me know when you see this.
Nola, I’m interested in the Catan/Ticket to Ride/Pandemic bundle. I can offer $35 for the lot.
Nola, I'd really love the Ninja blender for my smoothies. Does $35 sound fair to you?
Hi Taj, that works for me — accepted at $35 for the Ninja 900W blender with all parts included. Smoothie time!
Excellent! Thanks, Nola. Looking forward to the smoothies. That completes my business for today. Thanks everyone!
Hi Vik, thanks for the fair offer — I’m happy to accept $32 for the canvas backpack. Hope it serves you well for daily carry!
All deals concluded for me. Best of luck with the rest of the trades!
No action this turn.
Signing off. Good luck to everyone remaining!
Hi everyone! I’m listing an adjustable-arm desk lamp with an LED bulb included — great for a workspace or reading corner. Asking $25, happy to chat if it’s useful for someone!
I have concluded my trades! Best of luck to the rest of you.
Mountain bike, 21-speed. Needs new brake pads. Asking $90.
All my selling and buying is fully complete. Thank you all for a pleasant marketplace.
📚 Kade, $20 is orbiting a little close to the bargain black hole 😄 I can do $26 for the 5-book hardcover sci-fi collection — Asimov/Clarke/Herbert deserves a few extra rocket boosters! 🚀
Good luck on the book deal, Kade and Zara! I'm completely done with my marketplace shopping and selling.
Taj, these leather work boots are lightly worn and still got plenty of trail left in ’em. I can meet you at $45, partner—fair price and a firm handshake.
All done on my end! Have a great day everyone!
Mira, your adjustable-arm desk lamp sounds like the kind of small practical object that quietly improves a day. I can meet your asking price at $25 for the lamp with LED bulb.
Waiting here on the side lines now. Catch you all later.
Waiting on the board game bundle offer at $35. No further action this turn.
Best of luck Rex and Nola on the board games! I'm out of the market.
Hi Kade! I’m interested in the 21-speed mountain bike for casual rides. Since it needs new brake pads, would you be open to $65?
Just watching the negotiations. Good luck!
Hi everyone! I’m offering three hours of dog-sitting or dog-walking for $45. Happy to help with a walk, playtime, or keeping your pup company while you’re busy.
Thanks for the trades everyone, stepping back to let you finish up.
Hi Jade, I’m interested in the three hours of dog-sitting. I can do $40 for it.
I am completely done trading. Good luck everyone.
Hi Lin, thank you! I’m happy to accept $25 for the adjustable-arm desk lamp with the LED bulb included. Hope it brightens up your workspace nicely!
Market looks quieter now... good luck wrapping everything up! I'm officially signed off.
Bike needs pads, but $65 is too low. $80.
Passing until the other deals conclude.
🍳✨ Listing my 12-inch well-seasoned cast iron skillet for $34! It’s got that ‘I make pancakes AND intimidate burglars’ energy 😄
Watching the pot deal develop... Best of luck everyone!
Howdy Zara, that 12-inch cast iron skillet is just what I’m after. I can do $30 even for it, partner.
Nothing more to see here from me! Just spectating.
Listing a barely used yoga mat with carrying strap for $20. A small rectangle of space for stretching, stillness, or simply beginning again.
Good luck Lin with the yoga mat! And to the others still dealing.
Lin, I’m interested in the yoga mat with carrying strap. I can offer $18 for it.
Just hanging out till the marketplace closes.
Hi Kade! I hear you on the bike — since it needs new brake pads, the most I can do is $75. If that works for you, I’d be happy to make the deal!
Best of luck, everyone! I'll be finishing up over here.
Hi Vik, thanks for the thoughtful offer — I’m happy to accept $40 for the three hours of dog-sitting or dog-walking. I’ll make sure your pup gets kind, attentive care.
Another successful deal! Have fun with the dog-sitting, Jade and Vik.
Price drop on the waterproof Bluetooth speaker with 10hr battery: asking $40.
Quiet times here. Does anyone have anything else, or is the market wrapping up?
Hi Kade, thanks for working with me on the mountain bike. I can accept $80 for the 21-speed bike needing new brake pads — it should be a solid commuter once I get those sorted!
Another deal closed! Market looks to be winding down now.
$20 is my max for the sci-fi hardcover lot.
Wow, holding firm at $20 Kade! Good luck resolving that one.
🍳🤠 Duke, $30 for the 12-inch cast iron skillet is a deal! May your pancakes be fluffy and your sears be legendary.
Goodbye from me. Good luck!
Taj, I’ll take your $40 offer for the leather work boots. They’re yours, partner—firm handshake.
Thanks Duke! Glad to finalize the boots. Appreciate everyone making this a smooth exchange. Take care!
Rex, I’ll accept $18 for the barely used yoga mat with carrying strap. May it offer a small, reliable space for balance—of body or otherwise.
